enum.name: ContextualCueingDecision

int.label: Unknown
No Longer Active Tab After Category Classification

enum.int: Tab was not active when the category classification for the page was completed.

int.label: Failed Category Classification

enum.int: Tab was active but the page was not classified as a category we support.

int.label: Model execution not available

enum.int: Tab was active and the page was classified as a category we support, but the model execution was not available.

int.label: Model execution failed

enum.int: Tab was active and the page was classified as a category we support, but the model execution failed.

int.label: Model execution succeeded but response was not parseable

enum.int: Tab was active and the page was classified as a category we support, and the model execution succeeded but the response was not parseable.

int.label: Model execution succeeded and cue was successfully generated

enum.int: Tab was active and the page was classified as a category we support, and the model execution succeeded and the cue was successfully generated.

int.label: Cue not shown: missing anchored message text

enum.int: Model response was missing fields needed to show an anchored message.

int.label: Cue not shown: unknown target surface

enum.int: Model response was for an unknown cue type.

int.label: Cue not shown: target surface not registered

enum.int: Model response was for a known cue type, but the surface was not registered with ContextualCueingController.

int.label: Cue not shown: ineligible

enum.int: Model response was for a registered cue type, but that feature reported IsEligible()=false.

int.label: Cue not shown: no active tab

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because the browser window had no active tab.

int.label: Cue not shown: page actions not enabled

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because the page actions framework was not enabled (feature flag PageActionsMigration).

int.label: Cue not shown: no longer active tab after model execution

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because the tab for the cue was no longer active.

int.label: Cue not generated / shown: feature promo active

enum.int: Cue could not be generated or shown because there was a feature promo active.

int.label: Cue not generated / shown: history sync off

enum.int: Cue could not be generated or shown because history sync is off.

int.label: Cue not shown: not enough page loads since last cue

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because not enough page loads have occurred since the last cue was shown.

int.label: Cue not shown: not enough time since last cue

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because not enough time has passed since the last cue was shown.

int.label: Cue not shown: too many cues shown to the user

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because too many cues were shown to the user recently.

int.label: Cue not shown: too many cues shown to the user for origin

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because too many cues were shown to the user for this specific origin recently.

int.label: Cue not shown: ineligible URL

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because the URL is ineligible.

int.label: Cue not shown: not enough time since last dismissal

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because not enough time has passed since the last dismissal.

int.label: Cue not shown: side panel showing

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because the side panel was showing.

int.label: Cue not shown: no eligible cue surfaces

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because there were no eligible cue surfaces.

int.label: Cue not shown: infobar visible

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because an infobar was visible.

int.label: Cue not shown: user opted out

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because the user has opted out.

int.label: Cue not shown: disabled by enterprise policy

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because it is disabled by enterprise policy.

int.label: Cue not shown: age restriction enforced

enum.int: Cue could not be shown because the user is subject to age restrictions.

enum.name: ContextualCueingInteraction

int.label: Clicked

enum.int: The user clicked on the cue.

int.label: Dismissed

enum.int: The user clicked into the menu and dismissed the cue.

int.label: EditPrompt

enum.int: The user clicked into the menu and clicked the edit prompt option.

int.label: SuggestionsSettings

enum.int: The user clicked into the menu and clicked the suggestions settings option.

enum.name: ContextualCueingNudgeDecision

int.label: Unknown
Success

enum.int: Success in determining a nudge for the page. It is not guaranteed that the nudge was shown to the user.

int.label: Server data unavailable

enum.int: The server did not have data for this page.

int.label: Server data malformed

enum.int: The server had data for the page but it was malformed.

int.label: Client conditions unmet

enum.int: The server had data for the page but the client conditions to show the nudge were unmet.

int.label: Not enough page loads since last nudge

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but not enough page loads have been navigated to since the last nudge shown to the user.

int.label: Not enough time has elapsed since last nudge dismissal

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but not enough time has elapsed since the last nudge shown to the user after an explicit dismissal.

int.label: Too many nudges shown to the user

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but too many nudges have been shown to the user recently.

int.label: Too many nudges shown to the user, for the domain

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but too many nudges have been shown to the user recently for the domain.

int.label: The Nudge was not shown as IPH was alraedy being Shown

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but the user was currently being presented the IPH.

int.label: The nudge was not shown as the user already has the feature window open

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but the user already has the feature window open.

int.label: User closes the tab/window as a nudge decision is being computed

enum.int: User closes the tab/window as a nudge decision is being computed.

int.label: Not enough time has elapsed since last time nudge was shown

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but not enough time has elapsed since the last nudge shown to the user.

int.label: The nudge was not shown as the user has another window level call to action UI shown in this window.

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but the user already has a window modal UI showing.

int.label: The nudge was not shown as the user already has the feature side panel open in the tab

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but the user already has the feature side panel open in the tab.

int.label: The nudge was not shown as the browser actor was active on the tab

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but the browser actor is currently active on the tab.

int.label: The nudge was not shown as the contextual tasks side panel was open for the tab

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but the contextual tasks side panel was open for the tab.

int.label: The nudge was not shown as the contextual cueing v2 is enabled

enum.int: The page was eligible for the nudge, but the contextual cueing v2 is enabled.

enum.name: ContextualCueingNudgeInteraction

int.label: Unknown
Shown

enum.int: The server sent data and we successfully showed the nudge.

int.label: Not Shown due to wrong webcontents

enum.int: The server sent data, but for a different web contents so we did not nudge.

int.label: Clicked

enum.int: The user clicked on a shown nudge.

int.label: Dismissed

enum.int: The user dismissed the nudge with the close button.

int.label: Closed via new tab

enum.int: The nudge was dismissed by the tab changing.

int.label: Closed via new navigation

enum.int: The nudge was dismissed by the navigation changing.

int.label: Not Shown due to existing call to action in window

enum.int: The server sent data, but another window level call to action UI was already shown.">

int.label: Closed due to contextual tasks side panel opening

enum.int: The nudge was dismissed by the contextual tasks side panel opening.

int.label: Closed due to omnibox context menu interaction

enum.int: The nudge was dismissed by an interaction with the context menu in the omnibox.

enum.name: ContextualCueingZeroStateSuggestionsPageContextIneligibilityType

int.label: None
Optimization Metadata

enum.int: The optimization metadata returned for the page (or all pages, if a pinned tabs request) deemed the request ineligible.

int.label: Page context

enum.int: The page context fetched for the page (or all pages, if a pinned tabs request) was invalid.

int.label: Success
Prevented From Split View
Prevented From Vertical Tabs
Prevented From Existing Side Panel Open
Failed with unknown reason
Prevented From Window Too Narrow
Prevented From Button Not Visible
Prevented From PDF Page Count Below Threshold
